LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeWolfBane.label: wolfsbane vessel
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeWolfBane.description: Glass vessels filled with a potent mixture of wolfsbane extract. Shatters upon impact, releasing a short lived cloud of gas that burns any werewolves within.
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeWolfBane.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeWolfBane.verbs.0.label: throw wolfsbane vessel
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeWolfBane.label: wolfsbane vessel
